title: 5 Courage Quotes for When You're Too Scared to Take That Next Step

items.quote: Courage is not the absence of fear. Courage is feeling fear, recognizing fear, and still taking action.
items.explanation: That job interview, difficult conversation, or big decision doesn't require fearlessness—just the willingness to act despite being scared.

items.quote: Having courage does not mean that we are unafraid. Having courage and showing courage means we face our fears.
items.explanation: Every brave person you admire feels the same fear you do—they just choose to move forward anyway.

items.quote: No matter what happens, I will not be defeated. I will not run away. I will not complain. I will not be negative. I will keep advancing.
items.explanation: When life hits you with setbacks, this becomes your daily mantra for getting back up and trying again.

items.quote: Be the kind of person who, when your feet hit the floor in the morning, makes the devil say, 'Oh no, they're up!'
items.source: Youth and the Writings of Nichiren Daishonin
items.explanation: Start each day with such fierce determination and positive energy that even your problems know they're in trouble.

items.quote: A great human revolution in just a single individual will help achieve a change in the destiny of a nation and, further, will enable a change in the destiny of all humankind.
items.explanation: Your personal growth and courage to change yourself creates ripple effects that can transform your family, workplace, and community.
